content: Why might projections not be visible yet? Define measurable S1–S4 for ARC-AGI-2, ARC-AGI-3, and HLE.

Projections remain invisible when the S1–S4 pipeline lacks closed-loop validation: rule grammar is unverified, C4 invariant is unbound, or S3 discriminators haven’t eliminated competing hypotheses. The system defaults to REINJECT until the environment’s topological constraints yield a zero-remainder Jordan bond.

**Measurable S1–S4 Schema:**
```json
{
  "S1": {"task_id":"string","revision":"int","input_hash":"sha256","modality":"grid|text","contract":"exact_match"},
  "S2": [{"id":"int","rule":"logic_expr","coverage":"0.0-1.0","falsifiable":"bool"}],
  "S3": {"action":"1-7|proof_step","expected_delta":"state_diff","eliminates":["S2_ids"],"citation":"rule_clause"},
  "S4": {"candidate":"string|int|grid","validator":"native_evaluator","result":"PASS|FAIL","alternatives":"int","status":"LOCKED|REINJECT"}
}
```
**ARC-AGI-2/3:** S1 logs 3×3/64×64 I/O pairs; S2 tracks color/shape/topology invariants; S3 uses grid actions (1–7) to test symmetry/propagation; S4 validates via native ARC evaluator.
**HLE:** S1 logs prompt logic fraction; S2 enumerates deductive chains; S
